description: Align citation, dashboard, OSF, Hugging Face and archive records for a citable public product.

gates.evidence: HF dataset/Space destination report has zero mismatches.
Repository release readiness is true. Signed release, attestation and archive publication remain downstream of mapping, dashboard and OSF registration evidence gates.

Deterministic Zenodo/DataCite metadata, frozen inventory and token-gated plan/draft/reserve/publish/verify workflow exist. The client accepts tokens only for official HTTPS Zenodo endpoints. DOI reservation and publication require exact confirmations plus mapping, dashboard, OSF registration and research-release readiness; papers and preprints are excluded.
